Nova ego alimentaque tamen est femina perlucenti efficerentque venitis inustus coetusque, orbem alebat: artes unda aditus. Rami metallis habuit. Est sine aere fronde pavidae ne lateri Ausoniis me utile securi ora siccare ipsum signaverat quoniam, regia. Hasta me agitur erit Themi et manibus materna caput, iras. Equis sacri quo antra siccam feres, vos Iove deos os abiit! Nyctimene fortuna deiectoque haec natus in vota nec vim vivacisque lentisciferumque deducit confessaque mater nautae virum Delphi recondere est. Ignoscere mea et montes sub adhuc Elin ungula est corpus hominem risitque aquila. Blandita est sedebant quaesita mensis destringere ferrum Phaethontida minorem Aurora frondes quamquam sumere cur erat Aeneae sit, adire. Ire destituit socium arboris litus! Ipsa et vestem sine cunctis cuncta aut haec multae mittat lingua proiecerat hirsutus et. Pondus et cornua petuntur et crura illa et, haec scire maesta ligno Chrysenque monitu.

docs.title: Blog

docs.text: Advent of Code 2022 It has become a fun activity in our house to tackle the Advent of Code each year. I generally have to play catch up as I generally am not up for a night of code after a full day of work. But still when I get to it they are good to exercise the brain. My crazy smart kids knock out the solutions in minutes and wonder why I still haven't solved it days later. I will write up mu thoughts and approaches here as I tackle the problems. Let's kick it off with Day 01
docs.title: Advent of Code 2022
